extensionDescription.message: Select an area on any page and export exact-size screenshots for Chrome and Edge store assets.

popupSubtitle.message: Capture from the current page to create extension store assets at a specific size.

commandCapturePromo.message: Start a 440 x 280 promo image capture

commandCaptureBanner.message: Start a 1400 x 560 wide image capture

optionsIntro.message: Configure StoreShot for a focused extension-store screenshot workflow.

permissionsDetail.message: StoreShot only requests the permissions needed for local capture and download.

permissionActiveTab.message: Capture only the current visible tab after you start StoreShot.

permissionScripting.message: Inject the selection overlay into the current tab.

permissionDownloads.message: Save the generated PNG through browser downloads.

permissionStorage.message: Remember your target size and language preference.

languagesDetail.message: Choose the display language for StoreShot UI. Auto follows the browser language.

shortcutsDetail.message: Use keyboard shortcuts to start a preset capture without opening the popup.

shortcutsManageHint.message: To change key combinations, open chrome://extensions/shortcuts in your browser.

selectionPositionDetail.message: Restore the last successful selection separately for each website and target size.

aboutDetail.message: View the project repository and license.

errorRestrictedPage.message: This page cannot be captured. Try a normal website tab instead of a browser, store, or extension page.

errorSizeTooSmall.message: Size must be at least 64 px on each side.

errorSizeTooLarge.message: Size must be 8000 px or smaller on each side.

errorSelectionTooSmall.message: Selection is too small. Make the area larger and try again.

errorCanvasUnavailable.message: Image processing is unavailable in this browser context.

errorCaptureFailed.message: Capture failed. Check page permissions and try again.
